---
title: "Peru 2026 Election Portrait QC Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    df_print: paged
params:
  output_root: "output/average_faces"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(knitr)

resolve_report_path <- function(path) {
  # Allow the report to be rendered either from the repository root or from the
  # scripts directory without changing the parameter value.
  candidates <- c(path, file.path("..", path))
  existing <- candidates[file.exists(candidates) | dir.exists(candidates)]

  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop("Could not resolve report path: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  }

  normalizePath(existing[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

output_root <- resolve_report_path(params$output_root)
manifest_root <- file.path(output_root, "manifests")

image_manifest <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "image_manifest.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
group_manifest <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "group_manifest.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sex_manifest <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "sex_assignment_manifest.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
review_queue <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "sex_review_queue.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
party_summary <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "exclusion_summary_by_party.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
department_summary <- read_csv(file.path(manifest_root, "exclusion_summary_by_department.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

portrait_candidates <- image_manifest %>%
  distinct(id_candidato)

sex_manifest_portraits <- sex_manifest %>%
  semi_join(portrait_candidates, by = "id_candidato")

safe_image <- function(path) {
  if (!is.na(path) && file.exists(path)) {
    knitr::include_graphics(normalizePath(path, winslash = "/"))
  } else {
    "Not rendered"
  }
}
```

## Snapshot

```{r}
snapshot <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "Discovered portraits",
    "Readable portraits (all_faces)",
    "Retained portraits (filtered)",
    "Distinct portrait candidates",
    "Rendered groups",
    "Skipped groups"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(image_manifest),
    sum(image_manifest$eligible_all == "TRUE", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(image_manifest$eligible_filtered == "TRUE", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_distinct(image_manifest$id_candidato),
    sum(group_manifest$rendered == "TRUE", na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(group_manifest$rendered != "TRUE", na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

kable(snapshot)
```

## Sex Assignment

```{r}
sex_sources <- sex_manifest_portraits %>%
  count(sex_source, sex_confidence, needs_manual_review, sort = TRUE)

kable(sex_sources)
```

```{r}
sex_breakdown <- image_manifest %>%
  distinct(id_candidato, sex_assigned) %>%
  count(sex_assigned, sort = TRUE)

kable(sex_breakdown)
```

## Global Outputs

### Filtered

```{r out.width='32%', fig.show='hold'}
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "filtered", "all.jpg"))
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "filtered", "by_sex", "female.jpg"))
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "filtered", "by_sex", "male.jpg"))
```

### All Faces

```{r out.width='32%', fig.show='hold'}
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "all_faces", "all.jpg"))
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "all_faces", "by_sex", "female.jpg"))
safe_image(file.path(output_root, "all_faces", "by_sex", "male.jpg"))
```

## Groups

```{r}
group_counts <- group_manifest %>%
  count(blend_mode, group_mode, rendered, sort = TRUE)

kable(group_counts)
```

## Exclusions By Party

```{r}
kable(party_summary %>% arrange(desc(excluded_filtered), group_label) %>% slice_head(n = 30))
```

## Exclusions By Department

```{r}
kable(department_summary %>% arrange(desc(excluded_filtered), group_label))
```

## Review Queue

```{r}
if (nrow(review_queue) == 0) {
  knitr::kable(tibble(status = "No rows currently flagged for manual review."))
} else {
  kable(review_queue %>% select(id_candidato, nombre, sex_assigned, sex_source, sex_confidence, preview_image_path))
}
```
